name: infisical-secrets-action-azure
description: Azure DevOps extension that fetches secrets from Infisical inside pipelines.

scripts.build:task: ncc build src/index.ts -o dist/tasks/run --minify && cp src/task.json dist/tasks/run/task.json && cp logo.png dist/tasks/run/icon.png
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run build:task
scripts.package-extension: npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
scripts.publish-extension: npm run build && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
